name: rung_430_goldilocks_roundtrip_retry
utterances: Goldilocks was a little girl.
Goldilocks walked through the forest.
Goldilocks found a small house in the forest.
Papa Bear, Mama Bear, and Baby Bear lived in that house.
Three bowls of porridge were on the table.
A big bowl of porridge belonged to Papa Bear.
A medium bowl of porridge belonged to Mama Bear.
A small bowl of porridge belonged to Baby Bear.
Goldilocks tasted Papa Bear's porridge.
Goldilocks thought Papa Bear's porridge was too hot.
Goldilocks tasted Mama Bear's porridge.
Goldilocks thought Mama Bear's porridge was too cold.
Goldilocks tasted Baby Bear's porridge.
Goldilocks thought Baby Bear's porridge was just right.
Goldilocks ate all of Baby Bear's porridge.
The house had three chairs for the three bears.
A big chair belonged to Papa Bear.
A medium chair belonged to Mama Bear.
A small chair belonged to Baby Bear.
Goldilocks sat in Papa Bear's chair.
Goldilocks thought Papa Bear's chair was too hard.
Goldilocks sat in Mama Bear's chair.
Goldilocks thought Mama Bear's chair was too soft.
Goldilocks sat in Baby Bear's chair.
Baby Bear's chair broke while Goldilocks was sitting in it.
There were three beds upstairs.
A big bed belonged to Papa Bear.
A medium bed belonged to Mama Bear.
A small bed belonged to Baby Bear.
Goldilocks lay in Papa Bear's bed.
Goldilocks thought Papa Bear's bed was too hard.
Goldilocks lay in Mama Bear's bed.
Goldilocks thought Mama Bear's bed was too soft.
Goldilocks lay in Baby Bear's bed.
Goldilocks thought Baby Bear's bed was just right.
Goldilocks fell asleep in Baby Bear's bed.
The three bears returned home.
Papa Bear saw that Goldilocks had tasted his porridge.
Mama Bear saw that Goldilocks had tasted her porridge.
Baby Bear saw that Goldilocks had eaten all his porridge.
Papa Bear saw that Goldilocks had sat in his chair.
Mama Bear saw that Goldilocks had sat in her chair.
Baby Bear saw that his chair was broken.
The bears went upstairs.
Papa Bear saw that Goldilocks had lain in his bed.
Mama Bear saw that Goldilocks had lain in her bed.
Baby Bear saw Goldilocks asleep in his bed.
Goldilocks woke up and saw the three bears.
Goldilocks ran out of the house.
Goldilocks ran back through the forest.
Who ate all of Baby Bear's porridge?
Which bear's chair broke?
In which bed was Goldilocks asleep when Baby Bear found her?
